title: mcp Step params
description: Input Contract for the mcp Actuator (charter §2.3: generic MCP-client; ADR-0022). register pins the declared server's tool schemas at its rev; call invokes one tool — refused unless the tool is pinned at that rev, and arguments validate against the pin (rung 3: MCP-declared-and-pinned, drift blocking).

mode.description: register: pin the server's declared tool schemas. call (default): invoke one tool.

arguments.description: Tool arguments, validated against the pinned mcp/<server>/<tool>.input Contract.
